chapters.text: Darius kitipa leng chankal kum ni lhin kum, lha gup lhinna, chuche lha ma ma ni masa nin Judah gama gamvaipopa She-al’ti-el kitipa chapa Zerub’babel heng le thempu chung nung Jehoz’adak kitipa chapa Joshua henga Pakaiyin Haggai themgaopa kamin thu ahinseiyin hitin ati.
“Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Hiche mite hin Pakai houin sah phat ahung lhung hih laiye,” atiuve.
Hichea hin Pakaiyin Haggai themgao kamin thu ahinseitai.
“Nangho le nangho in kijemhoi tah tah a nachen’uva, hiche houin asesa akijam jam ding hi aphat achanga nagel’u hinam?
Hijeh chun tun thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Iti ti um nahiuvam phate chan nalungthim’uvin gel’uvin lang ngaito tem’uvin.

Nanghon muchi tampi natu’uvin, ahinla lhomcha na-atdoh bep’ui; an naneuvin, ahivangin navaset’in nanethei pouve; twi nadon’un, nadangchah-u jong achim deh poi; nangho le nang hon ponsil nakisil cheh-uvin, ahivanginla lum nasa thei deh pouvin ahi; tohman neiya sumloa pang jeng jong chun alodohsa sum chu akoina sakhao avangsa ahikit’e.
“Thaneipen Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye; Iti ti um nahiuvam phate chan nalungthim’uvin gel’uvin lang ngaito tem’uvin.
Thinglhang lama kijot touvun lang thing gasuiyun, houin hi saphauvin, chutileh keima lung lhaiying ting, kaloupina a kahung kilah thei ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Nang hon thil tampi nave lhi lhiuvin, vetan, themcha bou namudoh jiuve; hicheng jong chu inlama nahin poh tenguleh keiman kamut mang heljin ahi. Itidan ham, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye. Ajeh pentah vang chu nangho amitakip ama ama in kin cheh a nakisah lei soh keiyuva keima houin asesa akijam jeh hi ahi.
Hichejeh tah a hi nachunguva vanmun jousen gotwi atuh kih a, leiset’in aga ima asemdoh lou ahitai.

Chujongleh keiman gamsung le thinglhang gama lut ding, chang nehgam sah ding, lengpithei keh thah suhgam sah ding, thao jouse nehgama, leiset a keh jouse suhgam sah a, mihem le gancha chunga lansah a chule atohna chung jouseuva lansah dinga gamna khat kakousa ahitai,” ati.

Chutah chun She-al’ti-el chapa Zerub’babel le thempu chung nung Jehoz’adak chapa Joshua le mipi lah a ahingdoh amoh chengsen jong Pakai a-Pathenu thusei ogin chu angaiyun, athun anunguvin. Pakai a-Pathenuvin Haggai themgao kama ahinsei Haggai seidoh jouse chu anit tauve; chujongleh mipi hin Pakai chu aangsunga nasa tah-in aginguvin ahi.
Chuin Pakai thangkouva pang Haggai hin mipi jah a Pakai thupeh chu aseiyin hitin ati. “Keiman nangho kaumpi jing nauve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye,” ati.

Chujongleh Pakaiyin Judah gam vaipopa She-al’ti-el chapa Zerub’babel le thempu chung nungpa Jehoz’adak chapa Joshua lungthim jong chule mipi lah a ahingdoh amoh chengse lungthim jong atildoh tan, hijeh chun amaho hi ahunguvin thaneipen Pakai a-Pathenu houin sahdoh na din na atongtauve;
lha gup lhinna, chuche lha ma ma nisom ni le ni li lhin nia atoh pat’u ahi.
Darius leng chankal kum ni lhin kum, lha sagi lhinna, chuche lha ma ma nisom nile ni khat lhin nin Pakaiyin Haggai themgaopa kama thu ahinseiyin hitin ati;
“Judah gam vaipopa She-al’ti-el chapa Zerub’babel heng le thempu chung nung Jehoz’adak chapa Joshua heng, chule mipi lah a ahingdoh amoh chengse henga sei tei teiyin, hitin hin seiyin.
’Nangho lah a koipen hin hiche houin hi masanga aloupina lim le gong chu namu khah-uvam? Tua hi itobang banga namu’u hitam? Namit vet’uva hiche houin hi imacha louva um hilou ham?

Hijongleh tun hangtah-in pangin vo Zerub’babel, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; vo thempu chung nung Jehoz’adak chapa Joshua, hangtah-in pangin; chule gamsunga mipi jong hangtah-in panguvin, tin Pakaiyin aseiye; thaneipen Pakai chun, na tonguvin, keiman kapanpi jingnauve, tin aseiyin,
Egypt gama kona nahung potdoh laiyuva na henguva kaki tepna dungjuiyin kapanpi jing nauve. Nalah uva ka-Lhagao acheng jingin, hijeh chun kicha hih uvin.
Ajeh chu thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye; Phat chom khatjou tengleh keiman vanmun jouse le leiset chule Twikhanglen le tolgo lah jouse kaho lingsoh kit ding ahi;
namtin vaipi jouse kaho lingsoh keiya, chutengleh namtin vaipi lah a thil kikhol jouse hi hung lutsoh keiya, hiche houin loupi tah a kadip soh hel ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.
Dangka jong keiya ahin, sana jong keiya ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.

Anukhah a hiche houin loupina ding hi masanga aloupina masa sanga chu nasajo ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye. Chujongleh hiche muna haotheina kapeh ding ahi, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin ahi,’ tin seiyin,” ati.
Darius leng chankal kum ni lhin kum lha ko lhinna, chuche lha, nisom ni le ni li lhin nin Pakaiyin Haggai themgao kamin thu ahinseiyin hitin ati;
’Thaneipen Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Athu atan diuvin thempuho chu hiche hi donguvin.

’Mihem khat chun akithensosa satheng po le hen lang asangkhol chol ham khat’a achunna a chun achoilena changlhah ham, anme ham, lengpitwi ham, thaotwi ham, ahilou jongleh ipi thil hileh neh thei khat pen pen tongkha jeng taleh, hiche atoh khah thil neh thei chu athengin umtan tem?’ tin dongin,” ati. Thempuhon adonbut’uva, “Thengponte,” atiuleh;

Haggai seiyin lang, “Mihem khattou thilong atoh khah jeh a aboh a um chun hi tobang thil ho hi khatpen pen tongkha taleh, atoh khah thil chu aboh a um ding hitam?” tin dongin; hichea jong hi thempuhon, “Athil chu aboh a um ahitai,” tia adonbut’u leh;

Haggai, sei kit’in lang, “Ka-angsunga hiche mipi hileh hiche jat mite hi chuti ding ahi, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, chule akhut’uva abol jouseu jong chuti ding ahi; ipi hijongleh atouva akatdoh-u jong aboh a um ding ahitai.

Hijeh chun tua hi tuni nikhoa pat tu nung tengleh ipi hungsoh ding ham, phate chan nalungthim in gel’uvin lang ngaito tem’uvin. Pakai houin sahna dinga song khat chunga song khat naset thom masang uvin,

iti tia i-natiuvam geltoh dim dem’uvin ong? Mihem khat chu thil tedohsa ajat somni jen kisedoh a chu ahung leh ate-na som khatseh bou ahung mudoh-in, chujongleh lengpitwi chilna phunga lengpitwi te-na som nga kithaldoh dinga hungpan jong ate-na dim som ni bou ahung toh khai.
Keiman nalhosoh jouseu nget kanehsah a, thingmot kalhun khumsah a, gel kalhah khuma, hitobanga hi kabol vanguvin, kahenga nahung kile kit deh pouve, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
Tuni nikho lha ko lhinna nisom ni le ni li lhinnia pat hin phate chan gel them’uvin. Pakai houin inmun bulpi kipatdoh nikhoa pat hin gel’uvin ngaitouvin;
Changsal’a changchi um nalaiyam? Lengpigui le theichang phung chule kolbuthei phung ga lou hiuva, olive thingphung jong ga loulai ham? Tuni nikhoa pat’a keiman phatthei kaboh ding nahi.” ati.
Chuche lha, nisom ni le ni li lhin nin Pakaiyin Haggai henga avel’in anivei nan thu ahinsei kit’in, hitin ati;
“Judah gam vaipopa Zerub’babel henga seipeh-in, keiman vanmun jouse le leiset kaholing got ahitai;

chule lenggam jouse alaltouna kalekhup peh ding, namtin vaipi lenggam jouse thahat kasuh mangpeh a, kangtalai jouse akhup athal’a kalea, achunga tou jouse jong abung bu bua kachuhsah ding ahi; sakol jouse le achunguva tou jouse jong kijam chap soh keiyuva, sepaite chu akisatpi chemjama lousoh hel dingu ahi.

Thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin, hiche nikho chuleh nangma kapui ding nahi, vo kalhacha She-al’ti-el chapa Zerub’babel, tin Pakaiyin aseiyin, ken nang hi mohor kisemna khutjem banga kaman ding nahi; ajeh chu keiman nang hi kalhendohsa nahitai, tin thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiye.” ati.
